channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: Robbyant /lingbot-map | Python | N/A
item.description: A feed-forward 3D foundation model for reconstructing scenes from streaming data

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: facebook /astryx | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: An open source design system that's fully customizable and agent ready

item.title: CoreBunch /Instatic | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Instatic is a modern self-hosted visual CMS - get it running in 1 minute

item.title: simplex-chat /simplex-chat | Haskell | N/A
item.description: SimpleX - the first messaging network operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design! iOS, Android and desktop apps 📱!

item.title: ogulcancelik /herdr | Rust | N/A
item.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

item.title: roboflow /supervision | Python | N/A
item.description: We write your reusable computer vision tools. 💜

item.title: google /agents-cli | Python | N/A
item.description: The CLI and skills that turn any coding assistant into an expert at creating, evaluating, and deploying AI agents on Google Cloud.

item.title: ripienaar /free-for-dev | HTML | N/A
item.description: A list of SaaS, PaaS and IaaS offerings that have free tiers of interest to devops and infradev

item.title: xbtlin /ai-berkshire | Python | N/A
item.description: AI 时代的伯克希尔：基于 Claude Code / Codex 的价值投资研究框架。巴菲特·芒格·段永平·李录四大师方法论 + 多Agent并行研究。| AI-era Berkshire: a value investing research framework built for Claude Code / Codex. 4 masters' methodologies + multi-agent adversarial analysis.

item.title: diegosouzapw /OmniRoute | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 231+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.

item.title: altic-dev /FluidVoice | Swift | N/A
item.description: Fastest and only macOS Dictation app with on-device STT and custom trained AI enhancement model - Local Wispr Flow alternative. One ⭐ takes us a long way :)) Windows, iOS and Linux coming soon.

item.title: msitarzewski /agency-agents | Shell | N/A
item.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

item.title: usestrix /strix | Python | N/A
item.description: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.

item.title: hasaneyldrm /exercises-dataset | HTML | N/A
item.description: A comprehensive dataset of 433 fitness exercises. Each entry includes name, category, target muscle group, equipment, instructions, thumbnail image, and animation video.
